stem: She ___ in many famous films.
explanation: 现在完成时表经历，第三人称单数用 has + 过去分词 acted。

stem: ___ you ever been abroad?
explanation: 现在完成时的一般疑问句把 have 提到主语 you 前；ever 常与完成时连用。

stem: He has never ___ to London.
explanation: have/has been to 表“去过”，此处用过去分词 been。

stem: My sister ___ three books this year.
explanation: 主语 my sister 是第三人称单数，用 has + 过去分词 read。

stem: 填入 has 或 have：They ___ finished their homework.
explanation: 主语 They 是复数，助动词用 have。

stem: A train is ___ than a bus.
explanation: 比较两者用比较级，fast 是单音节词，加 -er 变 faster，后接 than。

stem: You ___ drive too fast on this road.
explanation: 表示“禁止、不准”用 mustn't + 动词原形。

stem: Everyone ___ obey the speed limit.
explanation: 情态动词 must 没有词形变化，后接动词原形 obey。

stem: This car is much ___ than mine.
explanation: new 是单音节词，比较级加 -er 变 newer；much 用来修饰比较级。

stem: 把 slow 改成比较级填空：A lorry is ___ than a car.
explanation: slow 单音节，比较级加 -er 变 slower。

stem: I ___ going to visit my aunt next week.
explanation: be going to 结构中，主语 I 用 am。

stem: ___ be late for the train!
explanation: 否定祈使句以 Don't + 动词原形开头。

stem: She is going to ___ her suitcase now.
explanation: be going to 后接动词原形 pack。

stem: They ___ going to fly to Rome.
explanation: 主语 They 是复数，be going to 中的 be 用 are。

stem: 填入合适的 be 动词：He ___ going to help us.
explanation: 主语 He 是第三人称单数，be going to 中的 be 用 is。

stem: What ___ going to happen to the company?
explanation: 疑问词 What 作主语视为单数，be going to 中用 is。

stem: I think it ___ rain tomorrow.
explanation: 对将来的预测用 will + 动词原形，will 没有词形变化。

stem: They ___ meeting the boss this afternoon.
explanation: 现在进行时表已安排好的将来，主语 They 用 are + doing。

stem: He ___ sell his house next month.
explanation: will 表将来，后接动词原形 sell，主语无论人称 will 都不变。

stem: 填入 will：We ___ know the answer soon.
explanation: 表将来用 will + 动词原形 know。

stem: The police ___ the thief last night.
explanation: last night 表过去，catch 的过去式是不规则形式 caught。

stem: ___ you read the report yesterday?
explanation: yesterday 表过去，一般过去时疑问句用助动词 Did 开头。

stem: She ___ not tell me the news.
explanation: 一般过去时否定用 did not + 动词原形 tell。

stem: They ___ home very late yesterday.
explanation: yesterday 表过去，come 的过去式是不规则形式 came。

stem: 把 report 改为过去式填空：The reporter ___ the accident last night.
explanation: report 是规则动词，过去式加 -ed 变 reported。

stem: I ___ dreaming when you woke me up.
explanation: 过去进行时中主语 I 用 was + doing。

stem: They ___ playing in the garden at five.
explanation: 主语 They 是复数，过去进行时用 were + doing。

stem: While she ___ sleeping, the dog barked.
explanation: 主语 she 用 was；while 引导过去正在进行的动作。

stem: What ___ you doing at ten last night?
explanation: 过去进行时中主语 you 用 were，构成 were you doing。

stem: 填入 was 或 were：We ___ watching TV at nine.
explanation: 主语 We 是复数，过去进行时用 were。

stem: I ___ just returned from a long trip.
explanation: 主语 I 用 have + 过去分词；just 常与现在完成时连用。

stem: ___ you seen John recently?
explanation: recently 强调对现在的影响，用现在完成时疑问句 Have you seen。

stem: He ___ me a letter last week.
explanation: 带明确过去时间 last week，用一般过去时 send 的过去式 sent。

stem: She has already ___ her dinner.
explanation: 现在完成时用 has + 过去分词，have 的过去分词是 had；already 与完成时连用。

stem: 填入 have 或 has：My friends ___ arrived at the station.
explanation: 主语 My friends 是复数，助动词用 have。

stem: Sally ___ out of the window happily.
explanation: 叙述过去动作用一般过去时，look 加 -ed 变 looked。

stem: The sun ___ shining while they travelled.
explanation: 过去进行时描写背景，主语 the sun 单数用 was + doing。

stem: They ___ a wide river on the way.
explanation: 叙述过去经历用一般过去时，see 的过去式是不规则形式 saw。

stem: Cows ___ eating grass in the fields.
explanation: 主语 Cows 是复数，过去进行时用 were + doing。

stem: 把 go 改成过去式：Last week they ___ to the countryside by train.
explanation: go 的过去式是不规则形式 went。

stem: We ___ walking when it began to rain.
explanation: 过去进行时表当时正在进行，主语 We 用 were + doing。

stem: The children ___ ahead of their parents.
explanation: 叙述过去动作用一般过去时，run 的过去式是不规则形式 ran。

stem: It suddenly ___ to rain in the woods.
explanation: 突发的动作用一般过去时，begin 的过去式是不规则形式 began。

stem: She was picking leaves when a butterfly ___ by.
explanation: when 引导突发短动作用一般过去时，fly 的过去式是 flew。

stem: 填入 was 或 were：The birds ___ singing in the trees.
explanation: 主语 The birds 是复数，过去进行时用 were。
